brief.coreMessage: Compare Telnyx vs Twilio for developers with latency data

headlines: Telnyx Voice AI: Sub-500ms Latency Versus Twilio’s Higher Delay
Compare Voice AI Latency: Telnyx Owns Network, Twilio Resells
Telnyx Voice AI: Single Platform, 140+ Countries, 70+ Languages
Latency Matters: Telnyx Voice AI Inference Co-Located with Telephony
Telnyx vs Twilio: Performance Data for Developers in Dark Mode
descriptions: Measure latency precisely: Telnyx delivers under 500ms with inference co-located on its own network, unlike Twilio’s multi-vendor setup.
Telnyx Voice AI offers HIPAA, SOC2, and PCI compliance with a unified platform spanning 140+ countries and 70+ languages.
Avoid Twilio’s fragmented infrastructure. Telnyx provides a direct network connection for consistent, low-latency voice AI performance.

reasons: Dark mode triggered by 7 competitive/technical keywords
